name: Dead Bug
newDescription: Begin by lying flat on your back. Keep your back in its natural position without flattening it. This will help you do the dead bug in the most efficient and effective way.

name: Seated Machine Calf Press
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by sitting down on a leg press machine, placing the balls of your feet on the bottom of the platform in front of you with a narrow width spacing and selecting the weight you would like to perform.

2.) Slowly, using your calves, push against the platform so that you move backwards, feeling a stretch in your legs and hold for a count.

name: Exercise Ball Crunch
newDescription: The crunch exercise is the most common abdominal exercise and often is improperly performed.

name: Foam Roll Hip Flexors
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by laying down on your back flat on the floor keeping your arms straight out and wide to your sides and feet extended out in front of you in a "T" position.

2.) Slowly raise your knees up until they are at thigh level and create a 90-degree angle to the floor, then begin by twist at your hips and lowering your knees towards the floor in a pendulum motion.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
newDescription: The Machine Shoulder Press is a popular exercise targeting the upper back and shoulder muscles, particularly the deltoids, and can also engage the triceps and upper chest. Here’s a step-by-step guide on how to perform it correctly:

name: Foam Roll Hip Abductors
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by laying down on your back flat on the floor keeping your arms straight out and wide to your sides and feet extended out in front of you in a "T" position.

2.) Slowly raise your knees up until they are at thigh level and create a 90-degree angle to the floor, then begin by twist at your hips and lowering your knees towards the floor in a pendulum motion.

name: Foam Roll Hip Adductors
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by laying down on your back flat on the floor keeping your arms straight out and wide to your sides and feet extended out in front of you in a "T" position.

2.) Slowly raise your knees up until they are at thigh level and create a 90-degree angle to the floor, then begin by twist at your hips and lowering your knees towards the floor in a pendulum motion.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start off standing up straight with your feet shoulder width apart and your arms rested at your sides, holding dumbbells in each hand.

2.) Raise the dumbbells to head level so that your arms are creating a 90 degree angle.

3.) Slowly push the dumbbells up, by extending through the elbows, over your head, feeling a stretch in your shoulders.

name: Mini Loop Band Standing Hip Extension
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Begin by standing and facing a wall. Position both hands on the wall for support.

2.) Stand tall throughout. Engage the core and the swing the leg backward, keeping the leg straight.

3.) Return back to the starting position.

4.) Repeat for as many reps and sets as desired.

name: Single Arm Landmine Press

newDescription: The barbell landmine kneeling one-arm press is an excellent exercise for targeting the shoulders, triceps, and core stability.

name: Arnold Dumbbell Press
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Begin by standing up straight with feet shoulder width apart and holding a dumbbell in each hand.

2.) Slowly, while using your thighs, raise the dumbbells to shoulder height and rotate your palms so that they are facing in towards your body.

name: Biceps Curl To Shoulder Press
matchedTo: Dumbbell Squat Curl To Shoulder Press

name: Single Arm High Cable Tricep Extension
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by setting up a high cable pulley machine with a straight bar and stand with your back facing the machine, grabbing the bar with an overhand grip.

2.) Bend down at the waist so that your body is almost parallel with the floor and keep a staggered position so that one leg is in front of the other.

name: Dumbbell Standing Hammer Curl To Front Press
Dumbbell Squat To Shoulder Press
newDescription: Performing a dumbbell squat to shoulder press is a compound exercise that targets multiple muscle groups, including the quadriceps, glutes, shoulders, and triceps.

name: Standing Single Arm Dumbbell Shoulder Press
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start off standing up straight with your feet shoulder width apart and your arms rested at your sides, holding dumbbells in each hand.

2.) Raise the dumbbells to head level so that your arms are creating a 90 degree angle.

3.) Slowly push the dumbbells up, by extending through the elbows, over your head, feeling a stretch in your shoulders.

newDescription: Walking, a form of cardio exercise, can be performed outside or on a treadmill and focuses upon burning calories, strengthening the core and leg muscles and increasing overall endurance and stamina

name: Elliptical
newDescription: The elliptical is a stationary exercise machine used to simulate walking, running or stair climbing.

name: Walking
newDescription: Walking, a form of cardio exercise, can be performed outside or on a treadmill and focuses upon burning calories, strengthening the core and leg muscles and increasing overall endurance and stamina

name: Cycling
newDescription: Road cycling is an exercise based upon racing bicycles that focuses on endurance, stamina, balance, coordination and bursts of speed.

name: Rowing
newDescription: Rowing is a sport that involves racing across rivers, lakes or oceans.

name: Running - Treadmill
newDescription: Treadmill running, just like regular running, uses the treadmill exercise equipment to burn calories, tone the body, increase stamina and endurance and is one of the most common forms of cardio exercises

name: Plank
newDescription:
Steps : 

1.) Start by kneeling on all fours and aligning both hands right below your shoulders keep your knees beneath your hips.

2.) Extend both of your feet out behind you and squeeze on your core muscles, making sure that your body is aligned straight 

3.

name: Seated Forward Bend
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by sitting up straight on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand and arms at your sides.

2.) While keeping your back straight and facing forward, slowly bend down to one side until you feel a stretch in your abs then return back to the starting position.

3.) Continue on to the opposite side and repeat.

4.) Repeat for as many reps and sets as desired.

name: Shin Box Hip Flexor
newDescription:
Steps : 

1.) Begin by kneeling on the ground or mat keeping one knee on the floor and the opposite knee bent and foot flat on the floor.

2.) Tighten up on your glutes and then do a pelvic tilt rocking on your back leg and hold for 15 to 30 seconds.

3.) Switch legs and repeat.

name: Head Tilt
newDescription:
Steps : 

1.) Start by sitting on either an exercise ball or bench, keeping your spine straight and knees bent.

2.) Tilt your head in one direction and squeeze back with your shoulders feeling a stretch from your blade down to your lower back.

3.) Hold for a few seconds and repeat in the opposite direction

name: Reach Behind and Open
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by laying with your back flat on the floor, keeping your knees bent, feet together and arms extended in front of you with fingers interlaced.

2.) Place your hands on your right thigh then slowly flex your abs and pull your hands up towards your knee until you feel a stretch in your abs.

name: Squat with Rotation
newDescription: Performing a forward lunge with rotation is a dynamic exercise that engages multiple muscle groups, including the legs, core, and obliques.

name: Downward Dog
newDescription:
Steps : 

1.) Begin this position on all fours with your hands directly underneath your shoulders.

2.) Push up with your hips towards the ceiling whilst extending your legs back.

3.) Keep a straight line from your arms to through your spine and your tailbone down through your legs.

4.) Hold this position for around 5 to 10 breaths, return to the starting position and repeat.

name: Superman Hold
newDescription: The superman exercise is great for the lower stretching and strengthening back and core muscles.

name: Seated Twist
newDescription:
Steps : 

1.) Start by sitting cross legged and keep your ankles positioned underneath the knees.

2.) Take your fingertips on your right hand and place them on the floor in front of you whilst your left fingertips are placed behind your body.

3.) With fingers in place put pressure down on the ground, twisting to your left or right, using more of your spine in the motion, and exhale to keep twisting deeper.

name: Child's Pose
newDescription:
Steps : 

1.) Begin this workout by sitting on your knees, keeping them tightly together and fold your body over your thighs. 

2.) Take your forehead and rest it to the floor and let your hands stretch back towards your feet, staying relaxed in through the motion.

name: Swimming
newDescription: Swimming is a great way to tone your body and improve overall fitness.

name: Side Bridge
newDescription: The side bridge exercise is a great core workout to improve strength and conditioning.

name: Stability Ball Hip Bridge
newDescription: The bridge exercise is a great exercise to help build and maintain core strength

name: Hiking
newDescription: Outdoor hiking is a physical activity that involves walking or trekking on trails, often through natural environments like forests, mountains, or parks. It can vary in intensity, from easy flat trails to steep, challenging climbs.

name: Prone Flutter Kicks
newDescription: The flutter kick exercise works and strengthens the hamstrings and the muscles on the back of the thigh.

name: Reverse Plank
newDescription:
Steps : 

1.) Start by kneeling on all fours and aligning both hands right below your shoulders keep your knees beneath your hips.

2.) Extend both of your feet out behind you and squeeze on your core muscles, making sure that your body is aligned straight 

3.

name: Mini Loop Band Glute Bridge
newDescription: The bridge exercise is a great exercise to help build and maintain core strength

name: Jumping Jack
newDescription: This is a classic bodyweight exercise that can be used in a circuit as well as part of a dynamic warm-up.

name: Running
newDescription: Running is one of the most common and effect forms of exercise for muscle toning, weight loss and keeping your lungs and body in shape.

name: Incline Bench Press
newDescription: The dumbbell incline bench press is an effective exercise for targeting the upper portion of the pectoral muscles, as well as the shoulders and triceps. Here are the steps to perform the exercise correctly:

name: One Arm Dumbbell Row
newDescription:
Steps : 

1.) Start by kneeling over the side of a bench placing the knee and hand of the supporting arm on the bench and then position the opposite foot on the floor.

2.) Grab a dumbbell from the floor opposite of the side supporting the body and pull the dumbbell up slowly to your chest, feeling a stretch in your back until it almost makes contact with your chest.

name: Seated Barbell Press
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start seated at either the end of a flat bench or bench press set-up with your feet on the floor in front of you, holding a weighted dumbbell in front of your chest at shoulder level.

2.) Slowly elevate the barbell up and above your head, squeezing your shoulders on the push up, and hold for a count.

name: Leg Press Calf Raise
newDescription: The calf press on a leg press exercise uses a leg press machine to help work and strengthen your calf muscles.

name: Twisting Hanging Knee Raise
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start off by grabbing onto a hanging grip or pull up bar, with a comfortable distance between your hands and a strong grip.

2.) Then slowly lift your knees in towards your chest until you feel tension on your lower abs.

3.) Hold this position for a few seconds then return back to the starting position and repeat for the desired reps and sets.

name: Cable Tricep Extensions
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by setting up a handle on a low pulley cable machine, facing the machine with your back bent keeping it parallel with the ground.

2.) Grab the handle, bring it to your side and tuck your elbow in towards your body.

3.) Slowly extend your arm back as far as possible, squeezing your tricep and hold for a count.

name: EZ Bar Preacher Curl
matchedTo: Ez Bar Preacher Curl Close Grip
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by setting up either weighted EZ bar with the weight that you would like to use to perform this exercise.

2.) Then sit down on the bench with your feet flat on the floor and arms extended out grabbing onto the bar with a close underhand grip.

name: Stiff Leg Deadlift
newDescription:
Steps :

1.) Start by standing up straight with your feet shoulder width apart and your arms at your sides with a weighted barbell held at thigh level.

2.) While keeping your knees still, slowly lower your upper body and the barbell towards the floor over your feet.

name: Walking Dumbbell Lunge
newDescription: The dumbbell walking lunge exercise helps strengthen the leg and core muscles through constant motion.

name: Seated Calf Raise
newDescription: The seated calf raise exercise is one of the simplest and most effective calf workouts.
